name: codexcali
description: A local Codex + Excalidraw AI image annotation canvas.

interface.shortDescription: Codex + Excalidraw local AI image canvas.
interface.longDescription: Open a local Excalidraw infinite canvas from Codex, persist pages and assets in the current project, create AI image holders, and insert generated or revised images through MCP tools.
defaultPrompt: Open the Codexcali canvas for this project.
Generate an image into the selected Codexcali holder.
Use this Codexcali annotation screenshot to create a clean revision.
